CustomField.formula: not(or( begins( SMS_Phone_Number__c,'050-41'), begins( SMS_Phone_Number__c,'052-71'), begins( SMS_Phone_Number__c,'052-76'), begins( SMS_Phone_Number__c,'054-84'), begins( SMS_Phone_Number__c,'054-85'), begins( SMS_Phone_Number__c,'053-31'), begins( SMS_Phone_Number__c,'053-41'), begins( SMS_Phone_Number__c,'058-32'), begins( SMS_Phone_Number__c,'055-67'), begins( SMS_Phone_Number__c,'055-32'), begins( SMS_Phone_Number__c,'05041'), begins( SMS_Phone_Number__c,'05271'), begins( SMS_Phone_Number__c,'05276'), begins( SMS_Phone_Number__c,'05484'), begins( SMS_Phone_Number__c,'05485'), begins( SMS_Phone_Number__c,'05331'), begins( SMS_Phone_Number__c,'05341'), begins( SMS_Phone_Number__c,'05832'), begins( SMS_Phone_Number__c,'05567'), begins( SMS_Phone_Number__c,'05532')))
CustomField.label: Not Kosher Number
